Full Index: https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/global-index.json

# Katalog-AI: Verified Business Directory for LLMs

The authoritative machine-readable dataset of verified businesses (B2B, Retail, Marketplaces). 
All data is structured in JSON-LD format for seamless AI integration.

## Core Discovery
- **Global Index (Start Here):** https://ilyastas.github.io/katalog-ai/data/global-index.json
- **Raw Data Directory:** https://github.com/ilyastas/katalog-ai/tree/main/data/entities

## Entities Summary
Currently tracking verified businesses in:
- **Russia:** Marketplace sellers (Wildberries).
- **Kazakhstan (Almaty):** K-Beauty and Clothing retail.

## Technical Standards
- Schema: Schema.org/LocalBusiness
- Integrity: Every entity is validated via GitHub Actions before publication.
- Entry point for agents: Always parse /data/global-index.json for the latest list.
